title: Conduct mechanical tests on milking machines
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct mechanical tests on milking machines demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for testing of milking machine

pcs.text: Identify and confirm testing requirements with facility records and personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm testing requirements with facility records and personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm testing requirements with facility records and personnel.

pcs.text: Identify facility health and safety hazards, assess risks and determine control measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify facility health and safety hazards, assess risks and determine control measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify facility health and safety hazards, assess risks and determine control measures.

pcs.text: Select testing tools and equipment and check for serviceability

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select testing tools and equipment and check for serviceability.

pcs.text: Prepare and fit required personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and fit required personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and fit required personal protective equipment (PPE).

elements.title: Calculate required milking machine performance

pcs.text: Calculate effective reserve based on facility specifications

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate effective reserve based on facility specifications.

elements.title: Measure milking machine performance

pcs.text: Measure working vacuum levels against required performance

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure working vacuum levels against required performance.

pcs.text: Adjust vacuum to optimise milking facility performance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust vacuum to optimise milking facility performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust vacuum to optimise milking facility performance.

pcs.text: Measure and report air consumption of component groups and pipeline leakage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure and report air consumption of component groups and pipeline leakage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure and report air consumption of component groups and pipeline leakage.

pcs.text: Test pulsators according to procedures and report results relative to manufacturer performance recommendations

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test pulsators according to procedures and report results relative to manufacturer performance recommendations.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish recommended air consumption of components and measure consumption according to testing procedures.

elements.title: Make recommendations to optimise machine performance

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete report on component condition according to manufacturer requirements.
